recommendations.title: The Last Word
recommendations.overview: A retired businesswoman – who tries to control everything around her – decides to write her own obituary. A young journalist takes up the task of finding out the truth, and the result is a life-altering friendship.

recommendations.title: Henry Poole Is Here
recommendations.overview: Henry Poole abandons his fiancée and family business to spend what he believes are his remaining days alone. The discovery of a 'miracle' by a nosy neighbor ruptures his solitude and restores his faith in life.

recommendations.title: The Mothman Prophecies
recommendations.overview: Reporter John Klein is plunged into a world of impossible terror when fate draws him to the sleepy West Virginia town of Point Pleasant, whose residents are being visited by a great winged shape that sows hideous nightmares and fevered visions.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Dead Man Walking
recommendations.overview: A death row inmate turns for spiritual guidance to a local nun in the days leading up to his scheduled execution for the murders of a young couple.

recommendations.title: The Uninvited Guest
recommendations.overview: Mysterious events lead an increasingly paranoid architect to believe a stranger is lurking in his large house.

recommendations.title: Trust No One: The Hunt for the Crypto King
recommendations.overview: When the young founder of a collapsing cryptocurrency exchange dies unexpectedly, irate investors suspect there's more to his death than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: M.F.A.
recommendations.overview: After the accidental death of her rapist, an art student becomes an unlikely vigilante, set out to avenge college girls whose rapists were not charged.

recommendations.title: The Conversation
recommendations.overview: A paranoid, secretive surveillance expert has a crisis of conscience when he suspects that the couple he is spying on will be murdered.

recommendations.title: Gone
recommendations.overview: A contemporary psychological thriller in which a young British couple travelling through the Australian outback become involved with a mysterious and charismatic American whose motive for imposing his friendship upon them becomes increasingly suspect
